text: A train travels 360 km in 4 hours. What is its average speed?
answer: The average speed is 90 km/hr. Speed = Distance/Time = 360/4 = 90 km/hr.

text: A can complete work in 12 days, B in 15 days. How long working together?
answer: They complete it in 6.67 days. A's rate = 1/12 per day, B's rate = 1/15 per day. Combined rate = 1/12 + 1/15 = 9/60 = 3/20. Time = 20/3 = 6.67 days.

text: Find the odd one out: 2, 3, 5, 9, 11, 13
answer: 9 is the odd one out. All others (2, 3, 5, 11, 13) are prime numbers, while 9 is composite (3×3).

text: Complete the series: 2, 6, 12, 20, 30, ?
If 20% of a number is 80, what is 35% of that number?
A shopkeeper sells an item at 20% profit for Rs. 240. What was the cost price?
answer: The cost price was Rs. 200. Selling price = 120% of CP, so CP = 240/1.2 = 200.

text: The ratio of ages of A and B is 3:5. After 10 years, it becomes 5:7. Find their present ages.
answer: A is 15 years, B is 25 years. Let ages be 3x and 5x. (3x+10)/(5x+10) = 5/7. Solving: 21x+70 = 25x+50, so 4x=20, x=5.

text: Choose the synonym for 'Ephemeral': (a) Eternal (b) Temporary (c) Strong (d) Weak
answer: (b) Temporary. Ephemeral means lasting for a very short time, fleeting, transient.

text: Identify the error: 'The team of players are practicing hard.'
answer: Subject-verb agreement error. 'Team' is singular, so use 'is' not 'are'. Correct: 'The team of players is practicing hard.'

text: Arrange in order: P, Q, R, S. P comes after Q, R comes before S, Q comes before R.
answer: The order is Q, P, R, S. Q before R, R before S, P after Q. So: Q first, then P, then R, then S.
